subject: LCL EXPORT ENQUIRY // Chennai to Busan // Tyre Moulds
body: Dear Sujatha, Please advise LCL export rates ex Chennai to Busan. POL Chennai, India; POD Busan, Korea. Terms FOB Chennai. Commodity: tyre moulds and accessories, 1,980 KGS, 3.8 CBM, wooden crates, non-DG, stackable. Kindly send freight, export charges and transit time. Regards, Ravi / Tyre Tools India.

subject: Bangkok to Chennai
body: 3 cbm LCL Bangkok to Chennai.

subject: SEA IMPORT RFQ // Shanghai to Chennai // Auto Components
body: Dear Priya, Kindly provide sea import LCL rate ex Shanghai to Chennai. POL Shanghai CNSHA; POD Chennai INMAA. Terms FCA Shanghai. Commodity urgent auto components non-DG 260 KGS 1.0 CBM. Please advise ocean freight documentation charges and Chennai local charges. Regards Leo / CN Air Express.

subject: Nansha to Chennai PPG
body: Need LCL 470 cbm Nansha to Chennai ICD PPG.

subject: Singapore to Chennai
body: Non-stackable 1.1 cbm SIN → Chennai.

subject: LCL DG RFQ // SHA → MAA ICD
body: Dear Priya, Requesting DG LCL import rates for a shipment ex SHA (Shanghai) to ICD MAA (final dest Chennai ICD). Cargo: UN 1993 Flammable Liquid NOS, PG II, packed 4 CMB UN-approved drums. Approx wt 1800 KGS / 3.8 CBM. Shipper insisting FCA SHA. Please confirm DG surcharge, MSDS reqs, CFS handling, dest THC + ICD handling. Regards, Kevin / CN Logistics.

subject: LCL RFQ ex Saudi to India ICD
body: JED→MAA ICD 1.9 cbm; DAM→BLR ICD 3 RT; RUH→HYD ICD 850kg.

subject: LCL IMPORT RFQ // Keelung to Chennai // Toys
body: Dear Sujatha, Request to quote your LCL import rates Keelung to Chennai for toy consignment. POL Keelung, Taiwan; POD Chennai, India. Incoterm FOB Keelung. Commodity: plastic toys and board games, non-DG, in color printed cartons, 580 KGS, 2.0 CBM, stackable. Please confirm freight, local charges and transit times for this lane. Looking forward to your best offer. Regards, Chen / Taiwan Cargo.

subject: Surabaya to Chennai
body: 3.3 cbm SUB → Chennai.

subject: LCL IMPORT // Izmir to Chennai // Machinery Spares
body: Dear Team, Kindly offer your LCL import rate for Izmir to Chennai. POL Izmir, Turkey; POD Chennai, India. Terms FOB Izmir. Cargo: machinery spares for textile mill, packed on 2 pallets, 830 KGS, 2.0 CBM, stackable. Please include local charges and usual transit time. Regards, Ayse / TR Freight Turkey.

subject: Return shipment to Chennai
body: Return of Japanese goods back to Chennai, 1.8 cbm.

subject: LCL IMPORT RFQ // Genoa to Nhava Sheva // Machinery
body: Dear Priya, Please provide LCL import rate Genoa to Nhava Sheva. POL Genoa, Italy; POD Nhava Sheva, India. Terms FOB Genoa. Commodity: machinery for packaging line, 1,150 KGS, 2.4 CBM, wooden case, stackable. Kindly share ocean freight, local charges at both ends and transit time. Regards, Marco / IT Lines.

subject: LCL RFQ ex Istanbul / Izmir
body: Ambarli→MAA ICD 2.4 cbm; Ambarli→HYD ICD 600kg; Izmir→BLR ICD 1.2 cbm.

subject: LCL IMPORT RATE // Xingang to Chennai ICD // Briefcases
body: Dear Sujatha, Kindly quote your best LCL ocean freight for the below new shipment. POL: Xingang, China. POD: Chennai ICD, India. Terms: FOB shipper's factory. Cargo details: 1 pallet, 260 KGS gross, 1.2 CBM, commodity: PU briefcases packed in cartons, stackable. Please include local charges at destination, standard free time and current sailing options ex Xingang to Chennai ICD via Chennai. Also advise if any peak season surcharge is applicable this week. Thanks and regards, Ramesh, Pricing Desk, Syena Logistics.

subject: LCL IMPORTS ex Jebel Ali
body: JBL→MAA ICD 2.2 cbm; JBL→HYD ICD 750kg; JBL→BLR ICD 1.9 cbm.

subject: ENQ // LCL IMPORT // Osaka to Chennai // Rubber Components
body: Dear Team, Please share your LCL console rate from Osaka, Japan to Chennai, India. POL Osaka; POD Chennai. Terms: FOB Osaka. Commodity: rubber components for automotive industry, non-DG, 32 cartons, 640 KGS, 2.3 CBM, stackable. Buyer also wants to know if any rubber board NOC is needed at destination. Kindly send ocean freight, local charges both ends and expected transit. Regards, Manoj / India-Japan Logistics.
